speaker: agent
text: Hi, this is Riya calling from the insurer about your policy renewal.

speaker: customer
text: I already told the last agent I'm not interested.

speaker: agent
text: I understand, I just wanted to quickly confirm your renewal date.

speaker: customer
text: This is such a hassle, I've been called three times this month already.

speaker: customer
text: Honestly it's getting annoying, can you people stop calling me.

speaker: agent
text: I'm sorry for the repeated calls, let me note that down.

speaker: customer
text: This is ridiculous, I want to speak to someone else.

speaker: agent
text: Understood, I'll arrange a callback from a specialist right away.
